mappings.implementation: IAM Policies with least-privilege; no wildcard * actions in production policies; IAM Access Analyzer findings reviewed
IAM MFA enforcement via SCP or account policy; AWS Organizations SCPs blocking console access without MFA
mappings.rule: mfa_enabled must be true for all users

mappings.implementation: AWS IAM credential report; Access Advisor last-used data; automated deactivation via Lambda or AWS Config rule
mappings.rule: last_used_days must be <= 90; null (never used) is a FAIL

mappings.implementation: S3 default encryption (SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS); RDS storage encryption; EBS encryption enforced via SCP
mappings.rule: default_encryption_enabled must be true for all buckets

mappings.implementation: AWS CloudTrail enabled in all regions; management events logged; log file validation enabled
mappings.rule: is_logging must be true for all trails

mappings.implementation: CloudTrail log file integrity validation; S3 Object Lock on log bucket; retention set to minimum 365 days
Security Groups with default-deny inbound; NACLs; VPC Flow Logs enabled; no 0.0.0.0/0 inbound on production groups
Security Groups blocking 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22/3389; Systems Manager Session Manager as alternative to direct SSH
mappings.rule: no inbound rule with cidr 0.0.0.0/0 and port in {22, 3389}
